The Platform

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built specifically for personal trainers. Not adapted from a generic SaaS tool.

✓
Verified Public Profile

Your profile lives at trainedby.ae/yourname. REPs UAE verification badge, specialties, packages, and a contact form — all in one clean page.

Free forever
🤖
AI Personal Assistant

Your own AI that knows your profile, your clients, and your market. Ask it to write a programme, draft a client email, build a nutrition plan, or explain your next steps.

Pro feature
📦
Digital Product Hub

Upload a PDF programme, a video course, or a meal plan. Set a price. Clients buy it directly from your profile. You get paid automatically.

Pro feature
🔗
Affiliate Vault

We negotiate affiliate deals with fitness brands on your behalf. Activate the ones you use, share your link with clients, earn commission on every purchase — automatically.

Pro feature
📊
Lead Management

Every enquiry from your profile lands in your dashboard. See who's interested, when they contacted you, and follow up with one tap. No leads lost to a generic inbox.

Pro feature
✍️
Community & Blog

Publish your expertise on the TrainedBy blog and community feed. Build your reputation, get discovered by new clients, and establish yourself as the authority in your niche.

Free forever

Getting Started

Live in under
5 minutes.

01
Create your profile

Name, specialties, your REPs UAE registration number, and a short bio. Your profile is live the moment you submit — no waiting, no approval queue.

~2 minutes
02
Get verified

Upload your certificate or enter your registration number. We cross-check it against the REPs UAE register. Your verified badge appears on your profile within 24 hours.

~1 minute to submit
03
Add your packages and products

Set up your session packages with prices. If you have a digital product — a programme PDF, a video, a nutrition plan — upload it and set a price. Clients can buy it directly from your profile.

~3 minutes
04
Share your link

Put your TrainedBy link in your Instagram bio, WhatsApp status, and anywhere else you're active. Every visitor sees your verified profile, your packages, and your work.

30 seconds

Pricing

Start free.
Upgrade when
you're ready.

No lock-in. Cancel anytime. Your profile stays live on the Free tier forever.

AED0 / month

Academy
Talk to us

For gyms, academies, and multi-trainer operations.

  • Everything in Pro

Contact us →

Questions

Common questions.

Do I need to be REPs UAE registered?
You can create a profile and go live immediately without verification. The REPs UAE badge is added once we verify your registration — usually within 24 hours. Non-verified profiles still get full access to all features.
How does the Digital Product Hub work?
Upload any file (PDF, video link, Notion document) and set a price. When a client buys it, the payment goes directly to your account minus a small platform fee. You get paid within 2 business days.
What is the Affiliate Vault?
We negotiate affiliate agreements with fitness brands on behalf of all TrainedBy trainers. You activate the brands you already recommend, share your unique link with clients, and earn commission on every purchase they make — automatically, every month.
Can I cancel anytime?
Yes. No contracts, no lock-in. Cancel from your dashboard and your profile reverts to the Free tier — it stays live, just without the Pro tools. Your digital products and affiliate earnings are yours to keep.
What is the trainer referral programme?
Every Pro trainer gets a unique referral link. When another trainer signs up to Pro through your link, you earn 20% of their monthly subscription — recurring, for as long as they stay subscribed.
How does the AI assistant work?
Your AI assistant knows your full profile, your specialties, your market, and your clients. Ask it anything — write a 12-week programme, draft a follow-up email to a lead, explain a nutrition concept, or help you price your packages. It responds in your language.

Your expertise.
Your profile.
Your practice.

Free to start. Live in minutes. No credit card required.
